name: 7p13_GLI3_NPC1L1_SD
description: 7p13 region containing GLI3 (Greig cephalopolysyndactyly / Pallister-Hall) and NPC1L1 (intestinal cholesterol transporter, ezetimibe target) flanked by intermediate-sized SDs. The SDs at 7p13 mediate rare interstitial deletions encompassing GLI3 producing contiguous-gene syndromes.

architecture.internal_structure: Small SD clusters (~20-50 kb) flanking GLI3 and additional duplicons proximal to NPC1L1; NAHR substrate is intermediate-sized rather than canonical >100 kb SD.
